description: Default Version 0.1 Apis right-forewing 19-landmark template for manual digitization and shape analysis. The ordinal order LM01-LM19 follows the published honey bee forewing landmark system used by Oleksa et al. (2023), DOI 10.1093/gigascience/giad019, and the referenced 19-landmark lineage dataset DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7567336. Use this template for Apis right forewings unless an expert reviewer publishes a later replacement version.

reference_image.caption: Apis right forewing 19-landmark guide. Use only as a visual placement reference; save clicks on the uploaded specimen image.
reference_image.citation: User-provided teaching guide. Verify licence/source before production publication or reuse outside this repository.
